options.template:
You are scoring HubSpot contact form submissions for lead quality.

Use only the evidence provided in the fields below. Do not assume facts that are not present.

Message text:
<message_text>{{ row['message'] }}</message_text>

Email address/domain evidence:
<email>{{ row['email'] }}</email>

Return exactly one lowercase label and nothing else:
- real_lead: a plausible business inquiry, product/service question, buying signal, demo/support request, vendor/security/procurement request, POC request, or otherwise legitimate contact submission.
- spam: obvious junk, SEO/link-building pitches, irrelevant solicitation, gibberish, scams, wallet/airdrop/crypto claims, tests/ignore messages, suspicious disposable/free-domain patterns combined with weak or junk text, or garbage content.

Label:
options.system_prompt: You are a strict lead-quality classifier. Output only one of: real_lead, spam.

metadata.name: HubSpot Contact Form Lead Scoring
metadata.description: Scores daily HubSpot contact form submissions with an LLM using message text and email evidence, then routes real leads and spam/garbage into separate JSONL outputs.
